notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Brett Sullivan out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Brett Sullivan out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Sullivan plunked
notableEvents.detail: Phillies challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Brett Sullivan hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh.

notableEvents.label: Troy Johnston pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Troy Johnston doubles (10) on a line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Willi Castro scores.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien flies out to center fielder Justin Crawford.

notableEvents.label: Adolis García GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adolis García grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Bryce Harper out at 2nd. Adolis García out at 1st.
